channel.title: Any ETA for the next release?
channel.description: Im going to be installing kick on a new machine + whonix vms and since there has been almost 2 months since 1.4.2 i was wondering if i the next release will be soon so i can go with it and avoid having to update everything twice in short period of time.

item.title: Any ETA for the next release?
item.dc:creator: vafogoj179
item.description:
Im going to be installing kick on a new machine + whonix vms and since there has been almost 2 months since 1.4.2 i was wondering if i the next release will be soon so i can go with it and avoid having to update everything twice in short period of time.

Read full topic
item.source: Any ETA for the next release?
